_comment: Proposed schedule spec for the nightly-sweep ops-agent DRY-RUN. This file is DECLARATIVE — the runner (nightly-sweep.mjs) does not read it; it documents the cron cadence + wiring the main session applies when it creates the live /schedule. NO secret sits here: creds come from the host environment ($ENV tokens below name them, never their values).
_mode_note: DRY-RUN ONLY. The runner never forwards --apply. Merging green patch/minor Dependabot PRs and applying audit fixes stay DEFERRED to the main session behind an explicit --apply, per feedback_main-session-executes-guarded-infra.

schedule._cadence_note: Nightly at 07:00 UTC — matches the existing audit/scheduled cadence (audit/scheduled/README.md) so the two nightly jobs sit on the same clock. Minimum interval for a Claude Code /schedule routine is hourly; nightly is well within that.

reads._gh_note: Read-only `gh pr list … --author app/dependabot` + `gh api …/code-scanning/alerts`. The guard blocks any `gh … merge` / `git push`.

audit_local_checkouts._note: OPTIONAL. If a var points at a local checkout root, the agent runs the local Claude/audit tool (`run.mjs --surface repo --target <path>`) for that repo's audit signal; else it falls back to the read-only gh code-scanning alert count; else honest-skips with a note.

notify.target: telegram (via the hosted [STUDIO_NOTIFICATIONS] n8n workflow, ../notify seam)
notify._note: The digest is a webhook POST to …/webhook/… — the sanctioned notify channel, NOT a guarded write. With the creds absent the agent honest-skips (nothing sent), never crashes.
